Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Zac Clifton
Message:
Add TrueNAS SCALE Omni infra provider with CI/CD pipelines

Complete implementation of the TrueNAS SCALE infrastructure provider for
Sidero Omni. Provisions Talos Linux VMs via the JSON-RPC 2.0 API with
automatic ISO caching, SideroLink connection, and full lifecycle management.

Key features:
- JSON-RPC 2.0 client with WebSocket and Unix socket transports
- 3-step provision flow: createSchematic → uploadISO → createVM
- Deprovision with VM stop/delete and zvol cleanup
- HOST-PASSTHROUGH CPU mode for Talos compatibility
- SideroLink connection params with encoded request IDs
- Integration tests against real TrueNAS instances
- GitHub Actions CI (test + lint) and release pipeline (binaries + Docker)
- TrueNAS app template for catalog publishing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
